title: bit type display confusing
key_bug_features: coalesce function displays different bit type results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 BIT(10), c2 INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT c1, COALESCE(c1, 0) AS coalesced_value FROM t2;
SELECT COALESCE(c1, (SELECT MAX(c2) FROM t2)) AS coalesced_with_subquery FROM t2;
